The core innovation stems from Dr. Louis Crowe's observation of the body's natural shivering mechanism and its calorie-burning potential. He discovered that by mimicking these electrical signals, intense muscle contractions and significant calorie expenditure could be achieved without the need for strenuous physical exertion or cold exposure. This groundbreaking concept led to the development of a wearable system that promises 'Exercise on Autopilot.' The system has garnered attention for its unique methodology, having been tested in zero-gravity environments with the European Space Agency and receiving clearance from the U.S. Food & Drug Administration (FDA).
